title: Antidepressant follow-up documentation

red_flags.text: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-completed self-harm and suicide risk assessment for antidepressant follow-up; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations

examination.text: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.
examination.rationale: Supports symptoms, function, context and comprehensive assessment for antidepressant follow-up; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.7 — recognition, comprehensive assessment, function, and context

medication.text: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.
medication.rationale: Supports medicine use, adherence, benefit, adverse effects and monitoring for antidepressant follow-up; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Medicine, dose, start date, adherence, response, adverse effects, mood, sleep, function, mental state, risk and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for antidepressant follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
